_meta.purpose: Cytology (cervical Pap / FNA) cell finding -> Bethesda category & significance. Keys are YOLO class names from the cytology detector (SIPaKMeD-style + Bethesda). Decision support/screening only; a cytopathologist reports.
_meta.source: SIPaKMeD classes + Bethesda System 2014. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

parabasal.name: Parabasal cell (normal)
parabasal.note: Normal; common atrophic/post-menopausal or immature epithelium.

koilocyte.name: Koilocyte (HPV cytopathic effect)
koilocyte.note: Perinuclear halo + nuclear atypia = HPV effect (LSIL). Recommend HPV test/follow-up.

dyskeratotic.name: Dyskeratotic / dysplastic cell
dyskeratotic.note: High N:C ratio, hyperchromasia -> HSIL. Refer for colposcopy.

ascus.name: Atypical squamous cells of undetermined significance

asc_h.name: Atypical squamous cells — cannot exclude HSIL
asc_h.note: Refer for colposcopy (HSIL cannot be excluded).

squamous_cell_carcinoma.name: Squamous cell carcinoma (cytology)
squamous_cell_carcinoma.note: CRITICAL: tumour diathesis + malignant cells — urgent referral.
